purpose: Phase 4 Agi-dominance re-check at current canon (post-Decision A reject of PP-717 D2, post-F12 MW cap propagation commit abf9fc8e)

entries.section: Architecture C (sim baseline; matches v27 convention)
entries.quoted_text: Flat stamina, yield, initiative: duel_stress_test.py v9 (Architecture C). Note: params/combat.md L15 canonical Stamina = End × 5; this sim uses Architecture C for consistency with v27 results which produced the original Agi-dominance finding.
Critical Hit (net hits ≥ 4): weapon modifier doubled before applying armour reduction. (PP-717 — raised from ≥ 3.)

entries.section: §Damage Formula, Weapon modifier vs armour tier table L94

entries.quoted_text: STR multiplier (multiplicative): Light×1, Heavy×2, Blade×1, Blunt×1.5

Face 1 = −1 success. Face 2–6 = 0. Face 7–9 = +1. Face 10 = +2. NOTE: this sim does not implement 10-chain (geometric continuation) for simplicity; the chain produces +0.13 expected net per die on average, suppressed in this sim. Both builds equally affected — does not bias the matchup.
Split Offence/Defence each round (PP-232). Note: this sim uses fixed 50/50 split. Canonical allows tactical allocation — sim is a controlled lower-bound test.

entries.value: -1D per wound to pool, no Ob
entries.quoted_text: Wounds: −1D per wound (cumulative). No Ob penalty from wounds. (PP-232)

sim_limitations_noted_in_results: No Feint, no ED, no Distance, no Initiative asymmetry — Strike-only
Single weapon (Light Blade Cut), single armour (None)
No 10-chain on dice (suppresses ~0.13 net/die expected, both sides)
High draw rate at stamina cliff (~85% in main test) — conditional win rate is the meaningful signal
rationale_lower_bound: Full v9 chassis (Feint, ED, Distance, Initiative) would likely amplify pool advantage further — initiative-holders pick counter-attacks; feints break defense allocation; ED forces opponent into adjacent-range TN penalty. This sim measures the floor of Agi-dominance under simplified mechanics.
